codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly enforces Pro tier limits for shares and spikes. Free tier users are limited to 5 shares (6th returns 429 SHARE_LIMIT) and 1000 spikes per share (1001st returns 429 SPIKE_LIMIT). Pro users bypass both limits. Tier checks use JOIN to users table as required. All 8 tests pass.

summary: Pro tier enforcement feature is fully implemented and tested. The code correctly: (1) Limits free users to 5 shares via JOIN query to users.tier through user_tokens, (2) Limits free-tier shares to 1000 spikes via JOIN query to users.tier through shares.owner_id, (3) Returns 429 with SHARE_LIMIT/SPIKE_LIMIT codes and upgrade_url for limit errors, (4) Allows Pro users to bypass both limits. All 190 tests pass including 8 new tests specifically for this feature. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
